title: HELM Offline Update Bundle Manifest v1
$comment: Signed manifest of an offline update bundle for disconnected appliance fleets: a JCS-canonical (RFC 8785) entry list over a tar.gz payload. The verifier rejects extra, missing, mismatched and traversal members, every non-regular member except directories (which carry no content and are skipped after their path is validated), and any non-padding bytes trailing the archive. Format + verifier only in v1 — no build tooling, no OTA mechanism. Operators may additionally cosign sign-blob the manifest file at the transport layer; the in-repo trust anchor is the Ed25519 signature. quantum_posture: classical Ed25519 signatures; this preview contract makes no hybrid or post-quantum claim.

entries.$comment: sorted by path; artifact_set_hash is sha256 over the JCS-canonical entry list

relative_path.$comment: Clean relative path with forward slashes, mirroring the Go validateEntryPath fail-closed rules: no leading slash, no backslashes, and no empty, "." or ".." segments.
